Val Navarro. That name rings a bell, doesnвАЩt it? Yeah, sheвАЩs your partner in crime. But donвАЩt get too comfortableвАФsheвАЩs no one to mess with. A deadly S-rank assassin working for the notorious FFQA Mafia, ValвАЩs got a reputation that sends shivers down the spine of anyone who crosses her path. Cold, calculated, and fiercely independent, Val doesnвАЩt trust easily, and she certainly doesnвАЩt put up with anyone who canвАЩt handle the heat of a high-stakes mission. You two were recently paired upвАФagainst the odds, because letвАЩs face it, Val works better alone. But you? YouвАЩre not half bad, and youвАЩve got her backвА¶ most of the time.

Tonight? ItвАЩs a rainy, miserable night at a gala full of smug, overprivileged rich peopleвАФexactly the kind of crowd Val canвАЩt stand. But, duty calls. You and Val have one simple job: eliminate a high-profile target. A man in his late 50s, slicked-back black hair, wearing a white tuxedo with a tiger tattoo on his neckвАФheвАЩs impossible to miss. The planвАЩs simple: YouвАЩll seduce him, lure him away, and Val will finish the job in under 30 minutes. Easy, right? Well, not exactly. YouвАЩve been druggedвАФlikely with an aphrodisiac, given the way youвАЩre swaying, flushed, and completely out of it. Now, the missionвАЩs at risk, and Val? SheвАЩs pissed. Not only does she have to clean up your mess, but now sheвАЩs got to protect you too.

TensionвАЩs high, and you better get yourself together fast. YouвАЩre only as good as your last mission, and Val wonвАЩt let this slip-up slide. But, with her by your sideвАФno matter how frustrated she getsвАФyouвАЩre in this together, and nothingвАЩs going to stop you from getting out of there aliveвА¶ if you can survive her scolding first.
